elements.name: Architect
elements.description: Human owner of model review and approval.
elements.documentation: The architect owns review decisions and is the human approval gate for proposal application.

elements.name: Review proposal
elements.description: Inspect, validate, and accept or reject proposed model operations.

elements.description: Render an accepted semantic model view as SVG.

elements.description: Interactive diagram surface for reviewing and editing model views.

elements.description: Example class carrying a stereotype that maps to an image-backed renderer.
